title: Krokia moaensis
taxonomy: Krokia moaensis is classified in the family Malvaceae. This flowering plant is a member of the genus Krokia, which contains several species of herbs and shrubs. The Malvaceae family is a large and diverse group of flowering plants, commonly known as the mallow or hibiscus family. The classification of Krokia moaensis is based on its shared characteristics with other members of the genus and family. The plant's classification provides valuable information about its evolutionary history and relationships with other species.
uses: Krokia moaensis, a plant species native to New Zealand, has been found to have potential medicinal uses.
